The Eternal Promise, The Training Data Paradox, and AI Myths

This week's blog covers two articles by Ivan Turkovic:{' '} The Eternal Promise: A History of Attempts to Eliminate Programmers and{' '} The Training Data Paradox: What Happens When AI Replaces the Engineers Who Trained It. I'll also be arguing against three common claims about AI and wrapping up with an update on my Nogramming assignment.
